article.title: SpaceX Seeks $75 Billion in Record IPO to Fund AI, Launch
article.summary: SpaceX is seeking to raise $75 billion in an initial public offering that would be the biggest of all time, as Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company targets a historic debut that could clear a path for more mega-listings.
article.title_zh: SpaceX 尋求募資 75 億美元創紀錄 IPO 資助 AI 和發射業務
article.summary_zh: SpaceX 尋求募資 75 億美元進行有史以來最大 IPO，馬斯克火箭、衛星和人工智能公司瞄準歷史性首秀，可為更多巨型上市鋪路。

article.title: SpaceX Seeks $75B in Record IPO Plan to Fund AI, Launch
article.summary:
SpaceX is seeking to raise $75 billion in an initial public offering that would be the biggest of all time, as Elon Musk’s rocket, space and artificial intelligence company targets a historic debut that could clear a path for more mega-listings.
The Starbase, Texas-based company plans to market about 555.6 million shares for $135, according to its filing Wednesday with the US Securities and Exchange Commission. At that price, SpaceX would have a market value of almost $1.77 trillion based on the outstanding shares in the filing. Bloomberg's Anthony Hughes reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: SpaceX 尋求通過創紀錄 IPO 計劃籌資 750 億美元以資助 AI 和發射
article.summary_zh: SpaceX 計劃通過創紀錄的首次公開募股籌資 750 億美元，這將是有史以來最大的上市，為馬斯克的火箭、太空和人工智能公司的歷史性首秀鋪平道路。

article.title: Microsoft unveils Project Solara AI, a chip-to-cloud platform built to power a new generation of 'agent-first' enterprise devices — hardware designed to run AI agents instead of traditional apps
article.summary: Microsoft has unveiled Project Solara, an Android-based chip-to-cloud platform for AI-first enterprise devices. The system combines Qualcomm and MediaTek hardware, Azure-hosted agents, and adaptive interfaces, with reference designs including a wearable AI badge and a desktop AI hub.
article.title_zh: Microsoft 推出 Project Solara AI，芯片到雲端平台專為新一代「代理優先」企業裝置設計 — 硬體設計用於運行 AI 代理而非傳統應用
article.summary_zh: Microsoft 推出 Project Solara，基於 Android 的芯片到雲端 AI 優先企業裝置平台，結合 Qualcomm 和 MediaTek 硬體、Azure 代理和自適應介面，參考設計包括可穿戴 AI 徽章和桌面 AI 中樞。

article.title: Google’s latest on-device AI model is custom-made for your laptop
article.summary: TL;DR Google has released the Gemma 4 12B model aimed at consumer laptops with at least 16GB RAM. Gemma 4 12B is the company’s first mid-sized model to support native audio input. It utilizes an encoder-free architecture to offer multimodal performance without the latency introduced by encoders. The new model performs close to the Gemma 4 26B MoE model in benchmarks. Back in April, Google released its mobile-friendly Gemma E2B and E4B models , bringing on-device multimodal AI to Android and iOS devices. It also released the high-end 26B Mixture of Experts (MoE) and 31B Dense models for higher-end devices with dedicated AI GPUs. Now, the company is launching another Gemma model that sits nicely between the four. Google today announced the Gemma 4 12B model aimed at bringing on-device AI cap
article.title_zh: Google 最新的裝置端 AI 模型為您的筆記型電腦量身訂製
article.summary_zh: Google 推出 Gemma 4 12B 模型，針對至少 16GB RAM 的消費級筆記型電腦，是首個支援原生音訊輸入的中型模型。

article.title: Trump signs AI executive order seeking 30-day government access to frontier models before release — voluntary framework will include classified benchmark to determine which models qualify
article.summary: President Donald Trump signed an executive order on Tuesday that asks AI companies to give the federal government early access to their most capable models.
article.title_zh: Trump 簽署 AI 行政命令，要求在發布前給予政府 30 天的前沿模型存取權 — 自願架構將包括分類基準判斷哪些模型符合資格
article.summary_zh: 川普總統週二簽署行政命令，要求 AI 公司在發布前向聯邦政府提供最先進模型的早期存取權。

article.title: Meta’s AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally
article.summary: WhatsApp will charge businesses for using its AI agent based on token usage.
article.title_zh: Meta 的 WhatsApp Business AI 代理現已全球可用
article.summary_zh: WhatsApp 將根據 token 使用量向企業收取使用其 AI 代理的費用。

article.title: Coralogix raises $200M on bet that someone needs to watch the AI agents
article.summary: Coralogix is among a growing number of infrastructure firms betting that as AI systems move into production, demand will rise for tools that can monitor their behavior, troubleshoot failures, and provide the operational data needed to keep them running reliably.
article.title_zh: Coralogix 融資 2 億美元，押注市場需要監控 AI 代理
article.summary_zh: Coralogix 是眾多基礎設施公司之一，認為隨著 AI 系統進入生產環境，對可監控其行為、排查故障並提供可靠運營數據的工具需求將增加。

article.title: Google AI Edge Gallery launches on macOS, letting Mac users run Gemini models locally
article.summary: In addition to Google AI Edge Gallery, which lets users run Gemma models locally on their Macs, the company also released the Gemma 4 12B model and the Google AI Edge Eloquent dictation app for the Mac. Here are the details. more…
article.title_zh: Google AI Edge Gallery 在 macOS 上推出，讓 Mac 用戶在本地運行 Gemini 模型
article.summary_zh: Google AI Edge Gallery 允許用戶在 Mac 上本地運行 Gemma 模型，該公司還發布了 Gemma 4 12B 模型和 Google AI Edge Eloquent 語音輸入應用。

article.title: Check your spam folder: Google’s $68M Assistant settlement emails are going out now
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Google Assistant users have started receiving emails to claim their part of a $68 million privacy settlement, but reports suggest the messages are ending up in spam folders. The lawsuit accused Google Assistant of recording conversations during false activations and allegedly using that information for ad targeting. Google denied any wrongdoing but agreed to settle the matter. To receive the payout, the settlement form must be completed by August 27, 2026. Google Assistant users are finally being notified about a $68 million privacy settlement, and if you think you might qualify, it may be worth taking a look inside your email’s spam folder.
article.title_zh: 檢查您的垃圾郵件文件夾：Google 的 6800 萬美元 Assistant 和解郵件現已發出
article.summary_zh: Google Assistant 用戶已開始接收領取 6800 萬美元隱私和解款項的郵件，但這些郵件可能被歸類為垃圾郵件。

article.title: Honor Magic V6 will finally be available globally in June as pre-orders begin
article.summary: Following an early unveiling three months ago, the Honor Magic V6 is finally rolling out to global markets this month. more…
article.title_zh: Honor Magic V6 將於六月在全球推出，預訂現已開始
article.summary_zh: 在三個月前提前發佈後，Honor Magic V6 本月終於向全球市場推出。

article.title: Google’s latest Android Canary build includes a social-media-friendly surprise
article.summary: TL;DR Android Canary 2606 adds Google’s upcoming Screen Reactions feature. The feature lets you record your screen and yourself simultaneously, with your camera feed overlaid on the recording. Users can choose between a transparent background or six different background colors for their selfie overlay. Google recently announced a new feature called Screen Reactions that aims to make creating reaction videos much easier. Now, we’ve spotted the feature rolling out in the latest Android Canary release , giving testers an early look at how it works. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
article.title_zh: Google 最新 Android Canary 版本包含社交媒體友善功能
article.summary_zh: Android Canary 2606 新增 Google 即將推出的 Screen Reactions 功能，允許同時錄製屏幕和自己，將攝像頭畫面疊加在錄製內容上。

article.title: Why CPUs still matter in the age of AI agents
article.summary: When the conversation turns to AI infrastructure, it almost always lands on GPUs and TPUs. The New Stack sat down with Bhumik Patel of Arm and Mo Farhat of Google to talk about the chip that rarely makes the headlines anymore: the CPU, and why it’s getting more important, not less, as AI shifts from chatbots to agents. Farhat, who leads product management for Axion and Arm-based virtual machines at Google Compute Engine, tells The New Stack , “The role, more or less, is of a CPU as an air traffic controller.” In this episode, we discuss how the shift from conversational chatbots to autonomous agents is quietly turning into a CPU story. The workload shifted from answering to acting Early chatbots returned a response, but agents can act on them. They perform tasks by callin
article.title_zh: 在 AI 代理時代，CPU 為何仍然重要
article.summary_zh: 雖然 AI 基礎設施討論往往聚焦於 GPU 和 TPU，但 CPU 在 AI 轉變中的重要性正在增加而非減少。
